themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times: Nearly all contacts are Managers with many waiting over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap in timely Product engagement with the practitioner layer that actually runs locations and reports daily.

Repeat accounts indicate unresolved pain: Multiple contacts from the same accounts—Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, and others—suggest that earlier outreach or product conversations did not fully address their needs, pointing to likely shared workflows or feature gaps affecting entire franchises or portfolios.

Cross-industry breadth requires flexible prioritization: Contacts span QSR, fitness, residential property management, travel, automotive, healthcare, and more, meaning the underlying product themes (reporting efficiency, location management, and time savings) must be framed vertically to resonate, even if the backlog items themselves overlap.
